aboutParagraph1: Hi! I'm the developer behind My Album FIFA 2026 ☕⚽
aboutParagraph2: This app was born out of pure frustration 😂: I was pasting stickers and got tired of flipping back to the physical index every five minutes. So I built a search tool... and couldn't stop there. Today it's a full digital album: search your country, mark the stickers you have, log your duplicates, and track your whole collection from any device.
aboutParagraph3: And to keep the kids (and the not-so-kids!) entertained, I added fun facts about each national team. All free, no ads, and always in your pocket.
aboutParagraph4a: If the app saved you time trading duplicates or pasting as a family, you can
aboutParagraph4c: and it's more than welcome! With your support, Studio84 will keep the search tool fast, ad-free, and with new features I'm already planning. Thanks for the support! 🙌
redirectBanner: We’ve moved 🏠 Our new address is
promoBannerCountryTitle: Sign up and mark the stickers you already have!
promoBannerCountryBody: The {count} stickers for {country} will appear here. Sign in with Google, select them with a click, and track all your countries from any device.
hintMouse: Click a sticker to mark it · Right-click to log duplicates
hintTouch: Tap a sticker to mark it · Long-press to log duplicates
modalHintRemove: Will be removed from duplicates and kept as collected only
importDesc: Copy the full collection from another account into yours. This action will replace all your current data.
importWarningLine1: This will replace your entire current collection with the one from the specified account:
importWarningBullet1: Your collection will match the source account exactly
importWarningBullet2: Your data will be backed up: if anything goes wrong, you can restore it with one click
importPhaseBackupSub: You'll always be able to return to this point if something goes wrong.
importErrorRestoredTitle: Something went wrong, but your data is safe
importErrorRestoredDesc: The import failed. Your {count} previous stickers were automatically restored.
importErrorNotRestoredDesc: The import failed and your collection could not be restored. Please contact support.
importError: An error occurred during import. Check the email and try again.
metaTitle: My FIFA Album 2026 — Digital Sticker Tracker | Panini World Cup Album
metaDescription: Your digital FIFA World Cup 2026 sticker album. Track the stickers you have, search pages by country code, and manage your Panini collection from any device. Free.
feature.import-collection.title: Import collection from another account
feature.import-collection.description: You can now copy the full collection from another account into yours with a single click. Available in your user menu. Your data is automatically backed up before importing, in case anything goes wrong.
feature.i18n-support.title: Full English and Spanish support
feature.i18n-support.description: The app is now available in English and Spanish. Switch languages from the footer. Country curiosities, dates, and all interface text adapt to the selected language.
feature.ux-improvements.title: Search usability improvements
feature.ux-improvements.description: The search bar now has two separate actions: the X clears text without losing focus (keyboard stays open on mobile), and the ← arrow goes back to the full list. The "I don't have it" button in the sticker modal is now red so it stands out clearly.
feature.last-touched.title: Last-touched sticker indicator
feature.last-touched.description: When you mark, unmark, or open the modal for a sticker, that card is highlighted with a yellow border so you don't lose your place between taps. The highlight disappears when you tap outside the panel.
feature.global-stats.title: Global counters — My Album
feature.global-stats.description: You can now see the complete summary of your collection at a glance: how many team, FWC, and CC stickers you have, plus your total duplicates. The panel updates in real time as you mark stickers.
feature.fwc-cc-cards.title: FWC and CC cards
feature.fwc-cc-cards.description: The album's special sections have been added: FWC (19 cards, pages 1–3 and 106–109) and CC (14 cards, pages 112–113). You can search them by name and track your stickers just like with national teams.
feature.nav-redesign.title: Navigation redesign
feature.nav-redesign.description: Cleaner top-bar: just What's New and your profile. The user button now shows your name with a dropdown menu. Footer items have been reorganized.
